title: Spectral Properties of $ C_{0}$-Semigroups of Positive Operators on C$^*$-Algebras
abstract: Let $ (T(t))_{t\geq0} $ be a positive $C_{0}$-semigroup with generator $A$ on a C$^*$-algebra or on the predual of a W$^*$-algebra. Then the growth bound $ω_{0}$ equals $s(A)$. If the spectrum of $A$ is not empty, then $s(A)$, the spectral bound of $A$, is a spectral value.
